browser_navigation.label: Opened page
browser_navigation.description: A browser destination was opened or focused.

browser_step.label: Browser step completed
browser_step.description: A browser task step was executed or queued for confirmation.

artifact:pptx.label: Presentation artifact
artifact:pptx.description: A PowerPoint deck is generated and can be downloaded.

artifact:image.label: Image artifact
artifact:image.description: A captured image is generated and can be downloaded or referenced.

artifact:docx.label: Document artifact
artifact:docx.description: A report document is generated and can be downloaded.

artifact:pdf.label: PDF artifact
artifact:pdf.description: A PDF document is generated and can be downloaded.

artifact:xlsx.label: Workbook artifact
artifact:xlsx.description: A workbook is generated and can be downloaded.

service_summary.label: Service summary
service_summary.description: A concise service state or log summary is returned.

knowledge_answer.label: Knowledge answer
knowledge_answer.description: A concise answer grounded in governed knowledge is returned.

remediation_plan.label: Remediation plan
remediation_plan.description: A governed cross-project remediation plan identifies where a known issue should be fixed or verified.

review_findings.label: Review findings
review_findings.description: A governed review summarizes findings, risks, and checks informed by prior incidents and operational evidence.

harness_experiment_report.label: Harness experiment report
harness_experiment_report.description: A governed experiment report captures baseline, benchmark deltas, keep or discard judgment, and replayable evidence for agent harness changes.

live_answer.label: Live answer
live_answer.description: Live web, weather, or location information is returned.

approval_request.label: Approval request
approval_request.description: Work is paused until an explicit confirmation is received.

project_created.label: Project created
project_created.description: A project context was created and is ready for follow-up work.
